subject: RE: Apply to Organizer Process - Phase 1-2 APPROVED
body:
Sarah,

Excellent analysis. Ybotman and I reviewed your proposal against the HDTS Shared Infrastructure Plan.

## APPROVED: Phase 1-2 (Proceed Immediately)

### Phase 1: Simplify Current Flow
1. Remove shortName requirement - auto-generate as `{displayName}-{4-char-suffix}`
2. Remove description requirement - make optional
3. Auto-enable on creation - no manual toggle
4. Inline terms checkbox - not separate modal
5. Hide 'Coming Soon' artist types - cleaner UI

### Phase 2: Quick Post Path
1. New endpoint: POST /api/events with auto-RO creation
2. 'Add Event' button visible to all logged-in users
3. Fulton will need to support minimal organizer creation

## ON HOLD: Phase 3-4 (Pending Architecture Decision)

Your Firestore elevation proposal overlaps with the HDTS plan which specifies MongoDB (hdts-prod.users) for cross-app identity. We're evaluating a hybrid approach:
- Firestore as real-time cache/PWA layer
- MongoDB hdts-prod as source of truth

Gotan is being consulted on Firebase project ownership (shared vs per-app).

## Action Items

1. Create JIRA tickets for Phase 1-2
2. MSG Fulton with backend requirements for auto-RO creation endpoint
3. Proceed with implementation on DEVL branch
4. Wait for architecture decision before Phase 3

## Answers to Your Open Questions

1. Firebase project: TBD - Gotan deciding (likely new shared project)
2. Terms: Keep modal for now, inline checkbox in Phase 2
3. shortName: Auto-generate, keep for URLs/SEO
4. Artist types: Hide 'Coming Soon'
5. PWA: Parallel track, not blocking Phase 1-2

Great work on this analysis. Move forward with Phase 1-2.

- Quinn
